title: Better Command Block Editor
description: Enhance your Minecraft command block experience with a powerful multi-line editor and optional features for better command management.
body:
## Intro : Better Command Block improves the way you edit and manage command blocks in Minecraft. This mod introduces a multi-line editor with an intuitive tab system, allowing you to write commands across multiple lines (limited only by memory). - 100% Vanilla Compatible – No new programming language, just enhancements to streamline your workflow. - Multi-Line Command Editing – Write commands across multiple lines for better readability. - Tab-Based Editing System – Edit multiple command blocks with an intuitive interface. - Quality of Life Features: - Execute command blocks with right-click (netherite hoe) (Not available in Fabric) - Destroy command blocks only with a netherite pickaxe - Open the Better Command Block IDE with right-click (wooden shovel) Customizable Settings – Enable/disable features and change item bindings in the configuration. ## Discover More Amazing Mods! Enjoy this mod? Don’t miss future updates! Click the Follow button on the project page to get notified when new content is released. 💚🚀 ## Partners : This project is proudly supported by BisectHosting. Check out their services to easily host your projects with quality and reliability.

## Call to Action : Have questions? Need help? Join us on Discord or visit our GitHub to get involved with the community and contribute!
